changes.description: Restructured SKILL.md output format: changed multi-feed digest `categories` from an object-of-arrays to an array-of-objects with `name`, `source`, and `articles` fields. Added explicit JSON template showing the expected structure. Added `highlights` as top-level array for cross-category stories. Removed unnecessary RSS feeds (Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera) and voice summary section to reduce token count. Added sections for single-article parsing and article summarization tasks.
